title: T-025 — UI: LOTO Procedures List + Apply/Clear modals (MNT-030, MNT-M-10, MNT-M-11) — safety-critical
prompt:
# T-025 — LOTO List + Apply + Clear modals

PRD: docs/prd/13-MAINTENANCE-PRD.md §10.3 MNT-030, §10.4 MNT-M-10, MNT-M-11, §11.2 V-MNT-07..09, §7.2 D-MNT-15
UX: prototypes/design/13-MAINTENANCE-UX.md:730-802
Prototypes: other-screens.jsx:488-598 (loto_list_page); modals.jsx:659-802 (loto_apply_modal, loto_clear_modal)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Route `/maintenance/loto` (active filter default, real-time SSE/polling alert banner) + safety-critical Apply (dismissible=false, two-person policy enforced server-side) and Clear (dual e-sign) modals — calls T-014 Server Actions.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/maintenance/loto/page.tsx` — RSC; URL `?activeOnly=true` default; active count banner uses 30s polling (SSE deferred — BL-MAINT-04). Conditional Tailwind bg-amber-50 for active rows.
2. Apply modal: shadcn Dialog with `onInteractOutside={(e) => e.preventDefault()}` (dismissible=false). useFieldArray for energy_sources_isolated + tags_applied. Final step: zero-energy Checkbox + verifier PIN Input. Calls T-014 applyLoto Server Action (e-sign via Wave1 T-124).
3. Clear modal: dismissible=false; pre-clear checklist; two-person sign-off strip (two separate request_signoff Server Action calls); allChecked && signed.t1 && signed.t2 computed server-side as prop; calls T-014 clearLoto with releaserPin.
4. RBAC: Apply requires `mnt.loto.apply`; Clear requires `mnt.loto.clear`. Verifier role enforced server-side per V-MNT-08.
5. V-MNT-09 advisory: if releaser === verifier and strict=false, modal shows warning Alert before submit.
6. Empty/loading/error/permission states + i18n (`maintenance.loto.list.*`, `maintenance.loto.apply.*`, `maintenance.loto.clear.*`).

## Prototype parity
- List active count banner + active row styling + Clear/View action buttons + active detail expansion card — RTL snapshot other-screens.jsx:488-598.
- Apply modal energy sources useFieldArray + tags/locks rows + zero-energy + PIN — snapshot modals.jsx:659-731.
- Clear modal pre-clear checklist + two-person sign-off strip + canConfirm gate — snapshot modals.jsx:733-802.

## Files
- apps/web/app/maintenance/loto/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/loto/_components/loto-list-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/loto/_components/loto-apply-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/loto/_components/loto-clear-modal.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/maintenance/loto/_components/__tests__/loto.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given list renders, when compared to other-screens.jsx:488-598, then active count banner + active row amber styling + active detail expansion card + Clear/View RBAC-gated match by RTL parity checklist.
2. Given Apply modal opened, when user clicks outside, then modal does NOT close (dismissible=false enforced via onInteractOutside preventDefault).
3. Given Apply submitted with verifier role NOT maintenance_technician AND NOT maintenance_manager, when settled, then T-014 returns LOTO_VERIFIER_ROLE_INVALID (V-MNT-08) and modal shows inline error.
4. Given Clear submitted with releaserUserId === verifierUserId AND strict=true setting, when settled, then T-014 returns LOTO_TWO_PERSON_RULE (V-MNT-09 strict) and modal shows inline error; given strict=false the same submit succeeds with warning Alert showing the advisory text.
5. Given Apply succeeds, when outbox is queried, then loto.applied event payload contains {mwo_id, verifier_user_id, energy_sources_isolated, tags_applied, verified_at}.
6. Given closeout, when reviewers inspect, then Playwright trace + screenshots attached per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL parity + Playwright e2e for Apply + Clear flows including dismissible=false interaction and inline error rendering.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/maintenance/loto`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow modal close on outside click — safety-critical.
- Do not store raw PIN client-side — pass to e-sign primitive only (T-124 via T-014).
- Do not bypass V-MNT-08 verifier role check — safety-critical (do not assume client RBAC is sufficient).
- Do not skip outbox emission — 12-reporting LOTO Compliance dashboard dependency.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not omit empty/loading/error/permission states.
